creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: dbaio
Date: Sat Jun 10 15:06:27 UTC 2017
New revision: 50355
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/50355

Log:
  Add Daniel Austin to contributors for net-mgmt/cacti

  He is also the maintainer of these ports:
  emulators/atari800
  graphics/gocr
  irc/miau
  irc/undernet-ircu
  mail/milter-greylist-devel
  mail/opendkim
  net/rtg
  net-mgmt/klg
  sysutils/sas2ircu
  x11-wm/ccsm
  x11-wm/compiz
  x11-wm/compiz-fusion
  x11-wm/compiz-plugins-extra
  x11-wm/compiz-plugins-main
  x11-wm/compiz-plugins-unsupported
  x11-wm/compizconfig-backend-gconf
  x11-wm/compizconfig-python
  x11-wm/emerald
  x11-wm/libcompizconfig
  x11-wm/simple-ccsm

  PR:		219854
  Approved by:	garga (mentor)
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.freebsd.org/D11123

Changes:
  head/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributors/contrib.additional.xml
